hero.title:
Design that
moves the world.
hero.desc: We craft meaningful digital and visual experiences through UI/UX, Graphic, and Product Design.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Clarity through design.
about.text1: Zenith Design is a Tokyo-based creative studio specializing in UI/UX, graphic, and product design. We partner with brands and startups to create purposeful, beautiful, and functional design solutions.
about.text2: Our multidisciplinary team blends strategic thinking with visual craftsmanship — delivering work that resonates with users and stands apart in the market.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.desc1: User research, wireframing, prototyping, and interface design that places people at the center.
services.desc2: Brand identity, visual systems, print, and digital communication that leaves a lasting impression.
services.desc3: End-to-end product thinking — from concept and usability testing to launch-ready design.

works.label: Portfolio
works.title: Selected Works
works.projectDesc: Short description of the project and the design challenge solved.
